title: Learn SPSV Business lesson by lesson.
description: Study SPSV business, tax, safety, customer service, licensing and area knowledge in focused lessons before taking the full mixed test.

lessons.title: Eco-Driving and Vehicle Operation
lessons.intro: Fuel efficiency, vehicle checks, engine use, tyres, lights and permitted vehicle features.
lessons.memoryTrick: Smooth, switched off, checked and roadworthy.
commonMistakes: Leaving the engine or air conditioning running unnecessarily
Treating a vehicle defect as safe to ignore

lessons.title: Driver Health, Fatigue and Manual Handling
lessons.intro: Tiredness, medication, working hours, lifting, crashes, phones and passenger seatbelts.
lessons.memoryTrick: Rest, assess, lift close and never rush safety.
commonMistakes: Using heat as a tiredness remedy
Moving injured people after a collision without necessity

lessons.title: Tax, Business and Finance
lessons.intro: Sole trader responsibilities, Revenue, Pay and File, expenses, marketing and banking.
lessons.memoryTrick: Separate money, record income, file tax and keep affairs current.
commonMistakes: Confusing annual and occasional business expenses

lessons.title: Customer Service and Professionalism
lessons.intro: Professional conduct, passenger communication, dress, lawful service and customer comfort.
commonMistakes: Discussing politics or ignoring a passenger's preference
Breaking road rules to satisfy a customer

lessons.title: Security, Law and Data Protection
lessons.intro: Personal safety, robbery prevention, cash handling, CCTV, data and legal penalties.
lessons.memoryTrick: Small cash, locked car, protected data and lawful driving.

lessons.title: Licensing and SPSV Rules
lessons.intro: Driver renewals, required equipment, operating areas, receipts, advertising and SPSV standards.
lessons.memoryTrick: Licence valid, equipment ready, area rules followed.
commonMistakes: Confusing driver and vehicle licence requirements
Assuming every pickup is allowed outside the licensed area

lessons.title: Maps and Area Knowledge
lessons.intro: Map colours, scales, routes, road types and grid references.
lessons.memoryTrick: Road colour first, direction second, grid last.
commonMistakes: Confusing primary, secondary, regional and motorway colours

lessons.title: Final Mixed SPSV Business Test
lessons.intro: All 81 SPSV Business questions mixed together.
lessons.memoryTrick: Identify the topic before choosing the rule.
commonMistakes: Answering too quickly when the topic changes
Using general driving knowledge instead of the SPSV-specific rule
